items.title: Jesus and the Eyewitnesses: The Gospels as Eyewitness Testimony. Eerdmans, 2006
items.author: Bauckham, Richard
items.why: Bauckham discusses the implications of eyewitness testimony in relation to Israel's rejection.
items.description: Bauckham discusses the implications of eyewitness testimony in relation to Israel's rejection.
items.citation: Bauckham, Richard. *Jesus and the Eyewitnesses: The Gospels as Eyewitness Testimony*. Eerdmans, 2006.

items.title: Jesus According to Scripture: Restoring the Portrait from the Gospels. Baker Academic, 2002
items.author: Bock, Darrell L
items.why: Bock analyzes the Gospels' portrayal of Israel's rejection of Jesus.
items.description: Bock analyzes the Gospels' portrayal of Israel's rejection of Jesus.
items.citation: Bock, Darrell L. *Jesus According to Scripture: Restoring the Portrait from the Gospels*. Baker Academic, 2002.

items.title: By Faith, Not by Sight: Paul and the Order of Salvation. P&R Publishing, 2006

items.why: Gaffin discusses the transition from law to faith in the New Testament.
items.description: Gaffin discusses the transition from law to faith in the New Testament.
items.citation: Gaffin, Richard B. *By Faith, Not by Sight: Paul and the Order of Salvation*. P&R Publishing, 2006.

items.title: The Gospel According to John. The New International Commentary on the New Testament. Eerdmans, 1971
items.author: Morris, Leon
items.why: Morris provides a detailed analysis of how John's Gospel relates to Old Testament texts.
items.description: Morris provides a detailed analysis of how John's Gospel relates to Old Testament texts.
items.citation: Morris, Leon. *The Gospel According to John*. The New International Commentary on the New Testament. Eerdmans, 1971.

items.title: Simply Jesus: A New Vision of Who He Was, What He Did, and Why He Matters. HarperOne, 2011

items.description: Wright explores the significance of Jesus' ministry in establishing a new covenant.
items.citation: N. T. Wright. *Simply Jesus: A New Vision of Who He Was, What He Did, and Why He Matters*. HarperOne, 2011.

items.title: The Passion of Jesus Christ. Crossway, 2004

items.why: Piper explores the significance of Jesus' death and resurrection in light of Old Testament prophecies.
